itemDisplayName: Deploy Dokku — self-hosted PaaS on Ubuntu 24.04
description: Deploys Dokku on an Ubuntu 24.04 LTS Gen2 virtual machine with Trusted Launch (Secure Boot + vTPM), Standard public IP, and SSH key authentication. Dokku is a self-hosted Heroku alternative — push your app with Git and Dokku handles build, containerisation, and deployment. Supports any language via Heroku Buildpacks or Dockerfile.
summary: Self-hosted Heroku (Dokku) on Ubuntu 24.04 with Trusted Launch, Standard IP, and SSH auth.
